591 NONINVSV_VNTLTR_ADMSN_CD NONINVSV_VNTLTR_ADMSN_CD Therapies: Non-Invas Mechanical Ventilator (Admis) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving non-invasive mechanical ventilator therapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
592 NONINVSV_VNTLTR_DSCHRG_CD NONINVSV_VNTLTR_DSCHRG_CD Therapies: Non-Invas
